channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped car, 29th May
item.description:
Dumped car no road tax time to remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Kimberley Avenue, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at bus stop, 29th May
item.description:
Fly tipping at bus stop o/s Sams barbers shop Da176dz perpetrators have been witnessed on private cctv & images should be available on newly installed cctv camera o/s96 lower road Da176dz. Rubbish nappies/food waste attracting vermin & spilling onto pavement/road,now becoming a health hazard on a regular occuranxe.Clean up required asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes blocking emergency access gate on Hemsworth Street, 29th May
item.description:
Counted 10 bikes last night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hemsworth Street, Hoxton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on the shared bike path, 29th May
item.description:
There are a series of potholes on the section of path over from the pond and up to the main path going across the heath that result in bikes having to slalom around to avoid them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Pond Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bin left! blocking pavement and becoming health hazard, 29th May
item.description:
This bin has been left here for a few weeks in the heat. and no bin lorry have collected it. it is currently obstructing cars, And the pavement and have been reports of animals/rodents going near the bin. And people are adding to it! This is a health hazard and needs removing ASAP!!!! as it blocking a public highway/pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandcliff Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter outside my house, 29th May
item.description:
Waste left on the street blocking pavement outside my property

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Castlewood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Upper Abbey Road, 29th May
item.description:
The pothole is getting worse. It’s been here for a few days now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Abbey Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Dead squirrel on pavement, 29th May
item.description:
There is a dead squirrel on the pavement right outside 97 Central hill. It has been there for 2 days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, Central Hill, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mallams Mews, Loughborough Junction, Greater London

item.title: Lighting are not working, 29th May
item.description:
Street Lighting from 10 Greenwich South street to the church are not working. Situation is quite bad and dangerous. Especially for a woman. The situation needs to be fixed asap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stolen car, no plate, been here for months, 28th May
item.description:
Stolen car, no plate, been here for months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandpit Place, Charlton

item.title: Bins overflowing, trash on the floor, 28th May
item.description:
There is so much trash around the bins and the bins are overflowing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cassland Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Missing toy/ swing, 28th May
item.description:
Since this swing was broken it has not been replaced yet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Eight Lime hire bicycles dumped en masse blocking the blind / sight impaired / wheelchair / pram / ablebodied persons' tactile paved dropped kerb and access to the two public cycle Sheffield Stands at the busy corner of Newlands Park / Newlands Parade shops and 228, Venner Rd, Penge / Sydenham border by Penge East Station., 28th May
item.description:
Eight Lime hire bicycles dumped en masse blocking the blind / sight impaired / wheelchair / pram / ablebodied persons' tactile paved dropped kerb and access to the two public cycle Sheffield Stands at the busy corner of Newlands Park / Newlands Parade shops and 228, Venner Rd, Penge / Sydenham border by Penge East Station. Seen and photographed at 6:12pm Thursday 28th May 2026. I have seen the Lime Bike Company unload a dozen hire bikes from a white box van at St Pancras Station a couple years ago occupying public bike stands and blocking the public footway at rush hour, This close collection of a single company's bikes at a station at rush hour is highly consistent with a repeat here of Lime bikes being irresponsible dumped. It is time to ban Lime from Bromley Borough public footways and carriageways.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree stakes broken, 28th May
item.description:
They are both broken and one is laying flat.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture flytipped and strewn, 28th May
item.description:
Flytipped furniture reported 5 days ago but still there. This is a repeat issue with the area near the recycling bin used as a refuse site. Bromley Council should take action as completely unfair on residents and businesses in the area. Can this be removed?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shopping trolley next to phone box.:, 28th May
item.description:
..please remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horsley Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees and shrubs, 28th May
item.description:
Trees overhanging pavement and shrubs encroaching pavement making it difficult to walk on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Elmers End Road outside Birkbeck railwa, 28th May
item.description:
Elmers End Road outside Birkbeck railway station is a pedestrian crossing with traffic lights. The black box which I assume controls these lights which is on the opposite side of the road to the railway station is graffiti tagged. Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Croydon+Rd,+London+SE20+7SX/@51.4040899,-0.0556096,3a,23.3y,113.99h,88.58t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sdQA33Mgk8DNbLPz7zWpM6A!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D1.4196902244217284%26panoid%3DdQA33Mgk8DNbLPz7zWpM6A%26yaw%3D113.98694245598084!7i16384!8i8192!4m6!3m5!1s0x48760112a0ff5c2f:0x128dcd77d742e657!8m2!3d51.408805!4d-0.0587512!16s%2Fg%2F1tlvn_k6?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDUyNi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
